title: Ministry of Finance (disambiguation)
content:
'''Ministry of Finance''' could refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Minister of Finance]]''' of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[New Republic]]
*'''[[Finance ministry (Galactic Empire)|Finance ministry]]''' of the [[Galactic Empire]]

==Legends==
*The '''[[Ministry of Finance (Galactic Republic)|Ministry of Finance]]''' of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]
*The '''[[Ministry of Finance (Galactic Empire)|Ministry of Finance]]''' of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
*The '''[[Ministry of Finance (New Republic)|Ministry of Finance]]''' of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]

{{Disambig}}
